content: strcmp  Table of contents Prototype: strcmp(string1, string2) Return type: boolean Description: Returns whether the two strings string1 and string2 match exactly. Arguments: string1 : string - String - in the range: .* string2 : string - String - in the range: .* Example: code body common control { bundlesequence => { "example" }; } bundle agent example { classes : "same" expression => strcmp ( "test" , "test" ); reports : same :: "Strings are equal" ; !same :: "Strings are not equal" ; } Output: code R: Strings are equal See also: regcmp() , regline()
title: strcmp
